shortDescription: 7,000+ games including sportsbook (horse racing, football, and more). Established 2018 — one of the longer-running brands in its portfolio
license: Disputed/unconfirmed — sources cite, inconsistently: Curaçao (license number given variously as 8048/JAZ2020-001 or via Antillephone as master licensor), Anjouan/Comoros (Anjouan Gaming Board), and a Philippines PAGCOR offshore license (reported by FinTelegram as the only current valid license, and explicitly NOT valid for European or most other operation)
